card.name: MLP CUBE 2 HEADED GIANT TIPS MLC
card.text: • Team life total is shared and starts at 30 life. • Teams take their turns simultaneously. Teams do not share any other resources other than life. For instance, any reference to "you" on a card still applies to the individual holder. You do not share mana. • Effects that read "target player", must select a single member of a team. • Players can block any creature(s) that are attacking them or their teammate. • The team that goes first skips their first draw step. Each player may mulligan once freely. • Information is shared between teammates. Teammates may look at one another's hand and communicate at any time.

card.name: MLP CUBE DRAFT TIPS MLC
card.text: • Teams draft 6 packs of 15 cards. Pass left during pack one, then alternate for each following pack. (pack two will go to the right, pack three to the left, etc.) • Your team picks 2 cards at a time from each pack. • Players share a card pool. Players pool the cards they open and build decks together. Each player builds a 40 card deck. • When deck building, you may add as many basic lands as you wish. • Most draft decks contain 23 nonland cards and 17 lands. • Try to draft at least 3 removal spells for each deck. • If you're unsure what to pick, taking a land card is always a safe pick. • Most decks contain 2 colours. If your deck contains more than two colours, make sure to take 3 or more lands.

card.name: Mane-iac
card.text: Flash When Mane-iac enters, choose target spell with one or more targets. Copy it X times, then reselect the targets at random for the spell and the copies. (X can be 0)

card.name: MLP CUBE FEEDBACK MLC
card.text:
MLP Cube is a 90% custom project excluding most lands and artifacts. For that reason, designs can and likely will change in response to feedback. The following includes questions I would appreciate your responses to after playing the MLP Cube.
My design goal for the MLP Cube has been to create a fun and flavourful cube, with easy to understand cards and a lowish power level that is accessible to beginners to Magic. For that reason I am looking for feedback on four main things. Balance, readability, fun, and flavor. Feel free to let me know your thoughts in person, or dm me at Shpungo on Discord.
Questions on the backside.

card.name: Princess Luna
card.text: Flash Flying, vigilance Raise the Moon — When Princess Luna enters, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Obsessed Fans
card.text: Autograph! — Whenever this creature attacks, note the name of target legendary creature on the battlefield that hasn't been noted for this creature. Tap that creature and put a stun counter on it. If a creature your team controlled was tapped this way, draw a card.

card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if your team gained life this turn, create a 1/1 white Cat creature token. Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, you gain 1 life.

card.text: Whenever an artifact you control enters, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may reveal it and put it into your hand. If you don't put the card into your hand, you may put it into your graveyard.

It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") {2}, {T}, Tap X untapped artifacts you control: Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control with mana value X. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Prize Apple
card.text: Whenever your team gains life, put that many ribbon counters on Prize Apple.Then if there are three or more ribbon counters on Prize Apple, remove those counters and untap it. {T}: Add one mana of any colour. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice Prize Apple: You gain 9 life.

card.name: Rainbow Dash
card.text: Flying Sonic Rainboom — Whenever Rainbowdash deals combat damage to a player, if she entered this turn, add {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. Dash {3}{U}{R} (You may cast this spell for its dash cost. If you do, it gains haste, and it's returned from the battlefield to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step.)

card.name: The Crystalling
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Target player searches their library for an artifact card, reveals it, puts it into their hand, then shuffles. II — Create a 0/0 colorless artifact Pony creature token with "This creature gets +1+1 for each artifact your team controls." III — Draw a card for each artifact your team controls.

card.name: Tirek & Discord's Reign
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.) I — Gain control of up to one target creature for as long as this saga remains on the battlefield. II — This saga gains "Whenever a creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control." Each player sacrifices a creature. III, IV — Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target player.

card.name: Sadistic Sphinx

card.name: Crystal Spike
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, sacrifice this artifact: Draw 3 cards.

card.name: Luna

card.name: Discord, Lord of Disharmony
card.text: Flying Whenever Discord deals combat damage to a player, exile a random card in your sideboard. As long as it remains exiled, you may play it, and mana of any type can be spent to cast it.

card.name: Quench
card.text: Counter target spell unless its owner pays {2}.

card.text: Whenever your team gains life during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature. Draw a card if you have 40 or more life. During your turn, creatures your team controls with +1/+1 counters on them have first strike.

card.text: Whenever Radiance deals combat damage to a player, create a tapped Treasure token. At the beginning of your end step, put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target artifact you control. If it isn't a creature, it becomes a 0/0 creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Elements of Harmony
card.text: When Elements of Harmony enters, Return up to six target legendary creature cards with different names from your graveyard to the battlefield. Legendary creatures your team controls get +X/+X where X is the number of legendary creatures your team controls.

Creatures your team controls gain trample and haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Boulder MLC
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. Activate only during your turn.

card.text: Whenever your second creature enters each turn, draw a card. {3}{W}: Attacking creatures get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Monster Apple MLC
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice a noncreature artifact. If you do, create a token copy of this creature. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Fluttershy, Resistance Fighter
card.text: Flying Whenever your team gains life during your turn, target creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Villainous Quest
card.text: Whenever a creature deals combat damage to one of your opponents, put a quest counter on this enchantment. {U}{B}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Draw a card for each quest counter on this enchantment. Target opponent loses life equal to the number of cards in your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Flurry Heart
card.text: Lifelink Flurry — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Flurry Heart gains flying until end of turn and deals damage equal to her power to target opponent.
